opportunities.title: Technical Program Management, Alignment
opportunities.description: Owns 3–4 simultaneous special projects within Anthropic's Alignment org, driving ambiguous cross-functional programs: model evaluations, research partnerships, and company-wide alignment initiatives. Ideal for someone comfortable synthesizing complex research context for leadership decisions. 5+ years required; AI safety familiarity a plus. $210k–$290k.

opportunities.title: Senior Responsible AI & Governance Manager
opportunities.description: Leads cross-functional responsible AI programs at PlayStation Global, ensuring AI products are developed ethically and in alignment with SIE's values. Conducts ethical and safety risk assessments and shapes company-wide best practices for AI development. 8+ years required. Hybrid, 2 days/week in San Mateo.

opportunities.title: Program Manager, Alignment
opportunities.description: Runs internal and external programs tied to AI alignment: events, fellowships, publishing workflows, research collaborations, and governance processes. Sits at the intersection of research operations and AI safety. 4+ years in research program management or operations. Hybrid in SF (3 days/week).

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Adversarial Model Research
opportunities.description: Coordinates across technical and non-technical stakeholders to drive adversarial AI research programs. Sits close to model safety and red-teaming work. Strong fit for someone with a TPM background and interest in model behavior, robustness, or safety evaluation. San Francisco, hybrid.

opportunities.title: Senior Technical Program Manager II, Applied AI
opportunities.description: Operational lead for Google Cloud's Applied AI deployment pods, driving enterprise customers from pilot to production at startup velocity. Manages cross-functional delivery across AI engineering and customer success. Mountain View (hybrid).

opportunities.title: WISP: AI for Next-Gen SOC Summit (Virtual)
opportunities.description: Virtual summit focused on AI applications in security operations. Free with WISP code. Good opportunity to reconnect with the WISP community ahead of in-person events.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers SF — Monthly Meetup
opportunities.description: Monthly SF meetup for AI practitioners and builders. Next event: Offensive Security Demo Night, June 25. Regularly attended by senior practitioners across ML, AI safety, and applied research.

opportunities.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026
opportunities.description: World's largest technical AI conference — 250+ speakers, 20+ tracks, 6,000+ attendees including VPs of AI, founders, and AI engineers. Tracks include governance, safety, and enterprise AI. Strong networking floor at Moscone West.
